title: Marcie Milner
compiled_truth: Marcie Milner is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-11-15 to 2001-07-31), Marcie Milner sent 22 and received 259 emails, totalling 281 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (22), [Paul Kaufman](people/paul-kaufman) (20), [Mona Petrochko](people/mona-petrochko) (19), [Mary Hain](people/mary-hain) (18), [Susan J Mara](people/susan-j-mara) (15).
